levels.description: Upon causing an Overloaded, Superconduct, Stellar-Conduct, Electro-Charged, Quicken, Aggravate, Hyperbloom, Lunar-Charged, or Electro-infused Swirl reaction, ATK is increased by 20% for 12s.
